item.title: Mark Vigeant: The Best Man Show - Dropout Presents
item.description:
Mark Vigeant examines loneliness, toxic masculinity, and the meaning of love as best man Paul Rose.

Duration: 58:05

Tags: Dropout Presents, stand up comedy, improv, laughing, mark vigeant, weddings, speeches, marriage, relationships, love and romance, loneliness, toxic masculinity, existentialism, absurd, chaos, off the rails, sam reich, katie marovitch, ross bryant, demi adejuyigbe

item.title: Don't Hug Me I'm Scared Teaser - Don't Hug Me I'm Scared
item.description:
It's time to get creative! The British surrealist adult puppet musical comedy horror series comes to Dropout. Join Red Guy, Yellow Guy, and Green Duck as they learn about everything there is to know with help from some friendly talking objects. The entire web series is available to stream. The television series premieres March 20th.

Duration: 01:00

Tags: Don't Hug Me I'm Scared, puppets, education, cheerful, singing, weird, surreal, disturbing, bleak, cynical, absurd, chaos, gross, horror, dark comedy, meta, becky sloan, baker terry, joe pelling

item.title: Introducing Dropout 24/7 - announcements
item.description:
